subject: Implement Phase 3: Model 2 - Software Licence with Royalties
body:
Add complete implementation of Model 2 with all 8 variants:
- 2A: Perpetual Licence (Upfront Payment)
- 2B: Term Licence (Annual/Multi-Year)
- 2C: Usage-Based Royalties
- 2D: Minimum Guarantee Plus Royalties
- 2E: Revenue Share / Profit Share
- 2F: White-Label / Reseller Licence
- 2G: Exclusive vs Non-Exclusive comparison
- 2H: Source Code Licence / Escrow

Features implemented:
- Developer perspective: asset recognition, revenue recognition (IFRS 15)
- Buyer perspective: licence capitalisation, royalty expense
- Combined perspective: consolidation elimination, asset efficiency
- Transfer pricing assessment with variant-specific benchmarks
- NPV calculations and amortisation schedules
title: Implement Phase 3: Model 2 - Software Licence with Royalties
